ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Player's username */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Gaming platform used by the user (PC, Console, etc.) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password encryption */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current account status (Active, Inactive, Banned, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with these statistics */,
  "xp" INTEGER /* Total experience points accumulated by the player */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Total time played in minutes */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Total number of kills made by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "kill_streak" INTEGER /* Longest kill streak achieved */,
  "targets_destroyed" INTEGER /* Total targets destroyed by the player */,
  "vehicles_destroyed" INTEGER /* Total vehicles destroyed by the player */,
  "soldiers_healed" INTEGER /* Total soldiers healed by the player */,
  "team_kills" INTEGER /* Total team kills committed */,
  "distance_moved" INTEGER /* Total distance moved in meters */,
  "shots_fired" INTEGER /* Total shots fired */,
  "throwables_thrown" INTEGER /* Total throwable items thrown */,
  "headshots" INTEGER /* Total headshots made */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gaming session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played during this session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode played during the session (e.g., Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with this entry */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user based on the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric used for ranking (e.g., Kills, XP) */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode for which the leaderboard is calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Base damage dealt by the weapon */,
  "range" REAL /* Effective range of the weapon in meters */,
  "reload_time" REAL /* Reload time for the weapon in seconds */,
  "fire_rate" REAL /* Rate of fire in rounds per minute */,
  "magazine_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in a full magazine */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon (e.g., Assault Rifle, Sniper Rifle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the map (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map's environment */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode for which the map is designed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_tag" TEXT /* Short tag or abbreviation for the team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the team leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_history" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the match */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map played during the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (Win/Loss) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., Bug, Suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the weapon */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon used */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played with the weapon */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills with the weapon */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths while using the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_usage_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)
